title: Smoky Zaalouk Eggplant Stew
description: A hearty, smoky eggplant stew inspired by Moroccan cuisine, featuring a rich and savory flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the savory in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the eggplant and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoky, moroccan, and tomato paste. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the eggplant is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
